query:
DELETE FROM metricas
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT COALESCE(
      (SELECT id FROM metricas m2 
       WHERE m2.vendedorId = m1.vendedorId 
         AND m2.mes = m1.mes 
         AND m2.totalVendas > 0
       ORDER BY m2.dataExtracao DESC 
       LIMIT 1),
      (SELECT id FROM metricas m3 
       WHERE m3.vendedorId = m1.vendedorId 
         AND m3.mes = m1.mes
       ORDER BY m3.dataExtracao DESC 
       LIMIT 1)
    ) as keep_id
    FROM metricas m1
    GROUP BY m1.vendedorId, m1.mes
  ) AS ids_to_keep
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user pKThLpGXzdZkTAu.ac53d9f9167d --database jUteHPSJGShqbZJcfArKWy --execute DELETE FROM metricas
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT COALESCE(
      (SELECT id FROM metricas m2 
       WHERE m2.vendedorId = m1.vendedorId 
         AND m2.mes = m1.mes 
         AND m2.totalVendas > 0
       ORDER BY m2.dataExtracao DESC 
       LIMIT 1),
      (SELECT id FROM metricas m3 
       WHERE m3.vendedorId = m1.vendedorId 
         AND m3.mes = m1.mes
       ORDER BY m3.dataExtracao DESC 
       LIMIT 1)
    ) as keep_id
    FROM metricas m1
    GROUP BY m1.vendedorId, m1.mes
  ) AS ids_to_keep
)
